title: UpsideDown Textures
body:
This resource pack rotates every texture 180 degrees, flipping everything upside down.
Warning: this will break most gameplay elements, including GUIs and item textures.
Not recommended for everyday use, but could be fun for challenges or videos!

Yeah i just rotated every texture 180 degrees so its upside down. 99% of the game will break btw, also gui and stuff. not advised for everyday use, but maybe fun for a challenge or video or something lol.
